title: Ranked Tier Tagger
description: This mod displays your tier and the tiers of other players who have been tested on Ranked Tiers.
body:
**🏷️ Ranked Tier Tagger**

The official nametag tiering mod, supported by rankedtiers.net.


NOTE: This mod depends on ukulib to work!

**📌 About**

Ranked Tier Tagger displays a player’s PvP Tier directly in their nametag.

The displayed gamemode is fully configurable
If a player is unranked in that gamemode, the mod will automatically show their highest overall tier

**Website: https://rankedtiers.net/**

**🧩 Supported Versions**

Currently Supported:
1.21 → 1.21.11

The mod is licensed under MPL-2.0
